senses.exampleEn: These charges are particularly burdensome for poor parents.

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：business(商人)+like(像)→务实有效的（像商人一样，效率高的）

memoryTip: 近形联想：buttress(mattress, 垫子)⟶支持，加强（提供垫子）

senses.label: 考法1

senses.label: 考法1

senses.exampleEn: A new road now bypasses the town.

memoryTip: 近形联想：callous(callus, 老茧)⟶冷漠无情的（心灵起老茧的，无感情的）

senses.label: 考法1

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：captiva(captive,俘虏)+te⟶使入迷，迷住（俘虏别人的注意力）

senses.label: 考法1

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to gain or win especially through effort

senses.en: someone or something that is very exaggerated in a funny or foolish way

senses.en: to represent or imitate in an exaggerated, distorted manner

senses.exampleEn: Her political career has been caricatured in headlines.

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to criticize harshly

memoryTip: 近形联想：cele(cello, 大提琴)+brate⟶庆祝（演奏大提琴）⟶赞美（庆祝节日，赞美神灵）

senses.label: 考法2

senses.label: 考法1

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：cere(center, 中心)+bra(brain, 大脑)+l⟶大脑的⟶理智的（依据头脑的）

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: intellectual and not emotional

shortMeaning: n.（因受辱、沮丧、失败等）失望，懊恼

senses.label: 考法1

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to hide or disguise
senses.exampleZh: 大雾笼罩着群山。
senses.exampleEn: The hills were cloaked in thick mist.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: a type of coat with no sleeves, a thing that hides or covers somebody or something
senses.exampleZh: 他们在黑暗的掩护下离开了。
senses.exampleEn: They left under the cloak of darkness.

memoryTip: 近形联想：clot(clog,堵塞)⟶堵塞物⟶凝固（活用为动词）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to become thick and partly solid
senses.exampleZh: 伤口周围的血很快凝结起来。
senses.exampleEn: The blood around the wound clotted quickly.

memoryTip: 近形联想：c(cold)+lum(numb,麻木)+sy⟶笨拙的（冷的麻木的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: awkward or inefficient in use or construction
senses.exampleZh: 他的手很笨拙，无法解开这个结。
senses.exampleEn: His clumsy fingers couldn't untie the knot.

memoryTip: 近形联想：clust(clot,凝块)+er⟶簇，组⟶聚集（活用为动词）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to come together to form a group
senses.exampleZh: 孩子们聚集在房间的角落里。
senses.exampleEn: The children clustered together in the corner of the room.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: a group of things of the same type that grow or appear close together; a group of people, animals or things close together
senses.exampleZh: 你可以看到夜空中的星群。
senses.exampleEn: You can see stars in clusters in the night sky.
collocations: a cluster of stars 星团

memoryTip: 谐音联想：co(一起)+a+lesce(“联系”)⟶联合，合并

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to unite into a whole
senses.exampleZh: 地面上水洼子里的水汇流成了一条小溪。
senses.exampleEn: The puddles had coalesced into a small stream.

shortMeaning: adj.连贯一致的，条理清楚的
memoryTip: co(一起)+her(adhere,粘)+ent⟶连贯一致的，条理清楚的（粘在一起的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.zh: 连贯一致的，条理清楚的
senses.en: logically or aesthetically ordered or integrated
senses.exampleZh: 他把他们的故事连在一起写成一个连贯的报导。
senses.exampleEn: He welded their stories into a single coherent account.
collocations: a coherent narrative/account 条理清楚的叙述/描述

memoryTip: collect(收集,集合)＋ive⟶共同的，集体的⟶集体（活用做名词）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: shared or done by a group of people
senses.exampleZh: 我们大家共同承担这项决定的责任。
senses.exampleEn: We all bear collective responsibility for this decision.

memoryTip: 近形联想：col(一起)+lide(slide,滑)⟶碰撞；冲突（滑到一起了）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to hit something or each other with strong force; to meet in opposition
senses.exampleZh: 那辆小轿车和货车在浓雾中迎面相撞。
senses.exampleEn: The car and the van collided head-on in thick fog.

memoryTip: 近形联想：col(一起)+lude(lock,锁)⟶共谋，串通（一起商量开别人家锁）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: conspire, plot
senses.exampleZh: 这起谋杀案是几个人串通策划的。
senses.exampleEn: Several people had colluded in the murder.

memoryTip: 近形联想：co(一起)+loss(损失)+al⟶巨大的（大家都损失，总量会很大）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: very large or great
senses.exampleZh: 巨大的纪念碑高耸于海港上。
senses.exampleEn: The colossal monument bestrode the harbor.
collocations: a colossal statue 巨大的雕像

memoryTip: 近形联想：comity(courtesy, 礼貌)⟶友好，和谐

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: friendly social atmosphere
senses.exampleZh: 国际礼让是国家之间基于善意和礼节彼此给予对方的习惯和礼貌作法。
senses.exampleEn: Comity is the practice, or courtesy, between states of treating each other with goodwill and civility.

memoryTip: 近形联想：commend(recommend,推荐)⟶称赞⟶表扬，推荐⟶委托

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to mention with approbation
senses.exampleZh: 他的设计受到了评委的高度赞扬。
senses.exampleEn: His designs were highly commended by the judges.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to entrust for care or preservation
senses.exampleZh: 我们把她的灵魂托付给上帝。
senses.exampleEn: We commend her soul to God.

senses.label: 考法3
senses.en: to recommend as worthy of confidence or notice
senses.exampleZh: 我想向您推荐这一方法。
senses.exampleEn: I should like to commend this method to you.

memoryTip: com(一起)+mensur(measure,测量)+ate⟶相称的（同样大小的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: equal or similar to something in size, amount, or degree
senses.exampleZh: 薪金将会与资历相称。
senses.exampleEn: Salary will be commensurate with experience.

shortMeaning: n.普通，常见之物，陈词滥调
memoryTip: 拆分联想：common(普通)+place(地方)⟶普通，常见之物，陈词滥调（各地都常见）⟶平常无奇的（活用为形容词）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.zh: 普通，常见之物，陈词滥调
senses.en: something commonly found; also: an obvious or trite comment
senses.exampleZh: 中国人似乎已经习惯了看这些报道，并慢慢接受它们，把它们当成司空见惯的事了。
senses.exampleEn: Chinese people seem to have gotten used to reading reports like these and gradually they have accepted them as commonplace.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: commonly found or seen:ordinary,unremarkable
senses.exampleZh: 去国外旅行已经变得很平常了。
senses.exampleEn: Traveling abroad has become commonplace.

memoryTip: 近形联想：compar(compare,比较)+able⟶可比的⟶类似的（类似才需要细致比较）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: used to say that two or more things are very similar and can be compared to each other
senses.exampleZh: 现在通货膨胀率已经和欧洲其他国家的差不多了。
senses.exampleEn: Inflation is now at a rate comparable with that in other European countries.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：compartment(分隔)+alize⟶分割，划分

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to separate into isolated compartments or categories
senses.exampleZh: 当今的生活被严格划分为工作和休闲两部份。
senses.exampleEn: Life today is rigidly compartmentalized into work and leisure.

shortMeaning: adj.有吸引力的；令人信服的；强大的
memoryTip: 近形联想：com+pell(push,推)+ing⟶令人信服的⟶有吸引力的⟶强大的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.zh: 有吸引力的，激发兴趣的
senses.en: very interesting
senses.exampleZh: 她新出的书读起来扣人心弦。
senses.exampleEn: Her latest book makes compelling reading.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: capable of causing someone to believe or agree
senses.exampleZh: 没有令人信服的理由让人相信他。
senses.exampleEn: There is no compelling reason to believe him.

senses.label: 考法3
senses.en: strong and forceful
senses.exampleZh: 他很顽强，有极大的野心和自我。
senses.exampleEn: He is tough with a compelling ambition and egotism.
collocations: a compelling need/desire 非常强烈的需要/欲望

memoryTip: 近形联想：com+pens(spend,花费)+ate⟶抵消，补偿

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to make an appropriate and usually counterbalancing payment to
senses.exampleZh: 该公司同意保持高产出水平以补偿损失掉的供应品。
senses.exampleEn: The company agreed to keep up high levels of output in order to compensate for supplies lost.
related: compensatory adj. 补偿的，赔偿的

memoryTip: 近形联想：compet(compete, 竞争)+ing⟶相互矛盾的（相互竞争的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: used for ideas, requirements, or interests that cannot all be right or satisfied at the same time
senses.exampleZh: 与竞争的产品比起来，我们的产品更小巧而轻便。
senses.exampleEn: Compared with competing products, ours are smaller and lighter.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：com(加强)+place(please,高兴)+nt⟶自满的（自己高兴的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: satisfied with how things are and not wanting to change them
senses.exampleZh: 我们决不能因进步变得自满。
senses.exampleEn: We must not become complacent about progress.
related: complacency n. 自满，沾沾自喜

memoryTip: com+plex(twist,fold,折叠)⟶复杂的，难懂的（折叠在一起的）⟶综合体（活用作名词）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: made of many different things or parts that are connected; difficult to understand
senses.exampleZh: 他们能处理复杂的局面吗?
senses.exampleEn: Can they grapple with the complex situation?
collocations: the complex structure of the human brain 错综复杂的人脑构造

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: a group of things that are connected, a group of buildings of a similar type together in one place
senses.exampleZh: 庆祝仪式在一个综合体育场举行。
senses.exampleEn: The ceremony was held in a sports complex.

memoryTip: com(一起)+plic(twist,fold,折叠)+ated⟶复杂的（折叠在一起的）⟶难懂的（词义抽象化）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: consisting of parts intricately combined; difficult to analyze, understand, or explain
senses.exampleZh: 这说明书看起来很难懂。
senses.exampleEn: The instructions look very complicated.
related: complicate v.使复杂化，使难理解

memoryTip: com(加强)+pos(pause,停止)+ed⟶镇定的，沉着的（停止表情活动的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: calm and in control of your emotions
senses.exampleZh: 她表面上好像很镇静。
senses.exampleEn: She seemed outwardly composed.
related: compose v. 使平静，使镇静

memoryTip: 拆分联想：com(加强)+prehen(prehend,抓住)+sible⟶可理解的（能抓住要点的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: capable of being comprehended
senses.exampleZh: 如果了解作者的生平，往往会觉得其作品更容易理解。
senses.exampleEn: One often finds a writer's books more comprehensible if one knows about his life.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：com(加强)+prehen(prehend,抓住)+sive⟶全面的，综合的（都抓住的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: covering completely or broadly
senses.exampleZh: 记者已做了全面的报道。
senses.exampleEn: The reporter has made a comprehensive report.
collocations: a comprehensive study 全面的研究
a comprehensive list of addresses 详尽的地址目录

memoryTip: 近形联想：comprise(compose,组成)⟶由...组成，包含

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to include or consist of
senses.exampleZh: 委员会由政府和私人部门的双方代表组成。
senses.exampleEn: The committee is comprised of representatives from both the public and private sectors.

memoryTip: com(together)+pro(forth)+mise(send, 提供)⟶妥协（双方都提供些好处）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to cause the impairment of
senses.exampleZh: 她接受了他的邀请，这件事已经使她的声誉受到了损害。
senses.exampleEn: She had already compromised herself by accepting his invitation.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to adjust or settle by mutual concessions
senses.exampleZh: 双方都不愿意妥协。
senses.exampleEn: Neither side is prepared to compromise.

senses.label: 考法3
senses.en: settlement of differences by arbitration or by consent reached by mutual concessions
senses.exampleZh: 双方经过长期的商谈终于达成了妥协。
senses.exampleEn: After lengthy talks the two sides finally reached a compromise.

memoryTip: 近形联想：com(加强)+punct(pierce,刺)+ion⟶悔恨，愧疚（良心发现，心如针刺的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: a feeling of guilt or regret
senses.exampleZh: 他向她撒了谎却毫无愧疚。
senses.exampleEn: He lied to her without compunction.

memoryTip: con(一起)+cede(走)⟶让步(双方都后退一步)⟶承认（认可对手的优点）

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to say that you accept or do not deny the truth or existence of
senses.exampleZh: 我得承认这件事情有它的逻辑。
senses.exampleEn: I had to concede the logic of this.

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to give something away, especially unwillingly; to allow somebody to have something
senses.exampleZh: 总统被迫把权力让给军队。
senses.exampleEn: The President was obliged to concede power to the army.

memoryTip: 近形联想：con(加强)+ceiv(receive, 接受,得到)+able⟶可以想象的，想得到的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: imaginable or possible
senses.exampleZh: 世人能想得到的每一个学科都蕴藏着极为丰富的知识。
senses.exampleEn: There is a vast store of knowledge in the world on every conceivable subject.

memoryTip: 近形联想：concili(counsel, 协商)+ate⟶平息，抚慰（通过协商使人不再愤怒）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to make (someone) more friendly or less angry
senses.exampleZh: 公司没法安抚罢工者，但失败了。
senses.exampleEn: The company's attempts to conciliate the strikers failed.
related: conciliatory adj. 安抚的，愿意和解的，调停的

memoryTip: con(together)+coct(cook)⟶混合，调制⟶编造，杜撰（调制故事）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to make by mixing different things together
senses.exampleZh: 这种汤是用多达十几种不同的鱼熬制而成的。
senses.exampleEn: The soup was concocted from up to a dozen different kinds of fish.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to invent or develop
senses.exampleZh: 她精心编造了解释她不在现场的一些谎言。
senses.exampleEn: She concocted some elaborate story to explain her absence.

memoryTip: 近形联想：con(强调)+demn(damage,harm)→谴责

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to declare to be reprehensible, wrong, or evil usually after weighing evidence and without reservation
senses.exampleZh: 政府发表声明谴责这些凶杀事件。
senses.exampleEn: The government issued a statement condemning the killings.

memoryTip: 近形联想：con(加强)+dign(dignity, 尊严)⟶适当的，应得的（有尊严的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: deserved, appropriate
senses.exampleZh: 公众一致称赞这个罪判得很恰当。
senses.exampleEn: The public approved the condign punishment.

memoryTip: 近形联想：con(加强)+duc(引导)+ive⟶有助于...的（引导发生的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: tending to promote or assist
senses.exampleZh: 椅子成排摆放不如成圈摆放便于讨论。
senses.exampleEn: Chairs in rows are not as conducive to discussion as chairs arranged in a circle.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：confession(忏悔)+al⟶ 自白的，忏悔的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: of, relating to, or resembling confession
senses.exampleZh: 应当录制一个私人的忏悔纪录片作为一个警告。
senses.exampleEn: An intimate, confessional documentary should be made as a warning.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：con(with)+fine(罚款)⟶限制（罚款限制人的行为）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to keep within limits
senses.exampleZh: 此项工作不会局限于格拉斯哥地区。
senses.exampleEn: The work will not be confined to the Glasgow area.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：con(with,within)+form(形状,标准)⟶服从，与...一致（使达成共同的标准）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to obey or agree with something
senses.exampleZh: 科学则通过证明事物都符合他的假设，来使得世界变得有意义。
senses.exampleEn: Science makes sense of the world by showing how things conform to its hypotheses.
collocations: conform to 符合，遵照

memoryTip: 近形联想：confound(confused, 困惑的)⟶使困惑

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to surprise and confuse
senses.exampleZh: 股价的突然上涨使经济学家大惑不解。
senses.exampleEn: The sudden rise in share prices has confounded economists.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to prove wrong
senses.exampleZh: 她驳倒了批评者的看法，证明自己能够胜任那项工作。
senses.exampleEn: She confounded her critics and proved she could do the job.
collocations: to confound expectations 证明期望有误

memoryTip: 拆分联想：con(with)+front(前面)⟶面对，面临⟶对抗

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to come face to face with, especially with defiance or hostility
senses.exampleZh: 这是他第一次面对一个持械劫匪。
senses.exampleEn: This was the first time he had confronted an armed robber.
collocations: confront a challenging task 直面困难

memoryTip: con(with)+fuse(flow)+ed⟶迷惑的（流到一起的，区分不清的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: unable to understand or think clearly
senses.exampleZh: 他感到沮丧，心里充满了迷惑。
senses.exampleEn: He was depressed and in a confused state of mind.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：con(加强)+ject(投射)+ure⟶推测，猜测（眼光投射向未来）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: an opinion or idea formed without proof or sufficient evidence
senses.exampleZh: 新闻报道证明了他的推测果然不假。
senses.exampleEn: The truth of his conjecture was confirmed by the newspaper report.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：con(together)+sens(感知，认识)+us→共识（有共同的认识）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: general agreement
senses.exampleZh: 教师们对必须加强学校的保安有普遍的共识。
senses.exampleEn: There is a general consensus among teachers about the need for greater security in schools.
collocations: an attempt to reach a consensus 达成共识的尝试

memoryTip: 近形联想：consequen(consequence,结果)+tial⟶随之发生的（作为结果的）⟶重大的（结果有重大影响的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: having significant consequences
senses.exampleZh: 这份报告讨论了许多有待决定的重大问题。
senses.exampleEn: The report discussed a number of consequential matters that were yet to be decided.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: consequent
senses.exampleZh: 这家公司正在考虑裁员，但希望可以避免一个随之而来的产能损失。
senses.exampleEn: The company is considering layoffs but hopes to avoid a consequential loss in productivity.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：consider(考虑)+able⟶重大的，相当多的（值得考虑的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: large in extent or degree
senses.exampleZh: 那项工程耗费了相当多的时间和资金。
senses.exampleEn: The project wasted a considerable amount of time and money.

shortMeaning: adj.连续的，持续的；一致的，协调的
memoryTip: con(together,一起)+sist(stand,站立)+ent⟶一致的，协调的（站在一起，统一行动的）⟶连续的，持续的（与之前一致的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: in agreement with sth
senses.exampleZh: 这些结果与我们早些时候的研究完全吻合。
senses.exampleEn: The results are entirely consistent with our earlier research.
collocations: a consistent argument 连贯流畅的论证

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: happening in the same way and continuing for a period of time
senses.exampleZh: 政府正在计划一种经济持续增长的模式。
senses.exampleEn: The government is planning a pattern of consistent growth in the economy.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：con(一起)+spi(看)+cuous⟶显眼的，明显的（大家都能看到的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: very easy to see or notice
senses.exampleZh: 广告都贴在了显眼的地方。
senses.exampleEn: The advertisements were all posted in a conspicuous place.

memoryTip: con(强调)+stitute(创立)→构成，组成

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: form or compose
senses.exampleZh: 听、说、读、写构成学习语言的根本方面。
senses.exampleEn: Listening, speaking, reading, then writing constitute the fundamental aspects in language learning.

memoryTip: con(加强)+strain(string,绳,拉紧)⟶约束，限制（用绳子拉紧）⟶强迫（加强限制）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to use pressure to force to do something
senses.exampleZh: 证据是那样的令人折服，他觉得不得不接受。
senses.exampleEn: The evidence was so compelling that he felt constrained toaccept it.
collocations: constrain sb to do sth 强迫某人做某事

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to limit or restrict
senses.exampleZh: 研究工作因经费不足而受限制。
senses.exampleEn: Research has been constrained by a lack of funds.

memoryTip: 近形联想：construe(construct, 建立)⟶理解（帮别人建立概念理解）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to understand in a particular way
senses.exampleZh: 他考虑这话该如何理解。
senses.exampleEn: He considered how the remark was to be construed.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：con(一起)+sum(总和)+mate⟶完成⟶完美的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: complete in every detail
senses.exampleZh: 他以高超的技巧投球进篮。
senses.exampleEn: He played the shot with consummate skill.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: finish, complete

senses.label: 考法1

senses.exampleEn: He launched a bitter diatribe against the younger generation.

memoryTip: 近形联想：di(double, two)+chot(cut,切分)+omy⟶矛盾（分成对立两方面的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: a division into two especially mutually exclusive or contradictory groups or entities

senses.exampleEn: There is a natural dichotomy between the two sides of one’s personality that is usually displayed between the different types of social groups with which an individual may identify oneself.

memoryTip: 近形联想：di(double, 双倍)+dac(dic, 说)+tic→说教的（反复说的）

senses.label: 考法1

senses.exampleEn: The style of programs was innovative and pioneering, and we managed to move from rather didactic sounding programs to an FM friendly sound to attract the radio stations.

memoryTip: 近形联想：di(否定)+ffident(confident, 自信的)→犹豫不决的（缺乏自信而无法采取行动）→羞怯的（在别人面前表现出无自信的状态）

senses.label: 考法1

senses.label: 考法2

senses.exampleEn: He becomes diffident around girls.

shortMeaning: adj.冗长的，啰嗦的；分散的，弥散的
memoryTip: dif(apart,分开)+fuse(流)⟶传播⟶分散的（活用作形容词）⟶冗长的，啰嗦的（言辞分散的）

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: dis(off)+card(卡片)⟶丢弃，抛弃（扔掉无用的卡片）

memoryTip: 近形联想：disciple(discipline,纪律)→信徒（徒弟们要遵守纪律）

shortMeaning: adj.自由决定的，便宜行事的
memoryTip: 近形联想：discretion(谨慎考虑, 自由决定权)+ary⟶自由决定的，便宜行事的

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：dis(away, 离开)+curs(course, 轨道)+ive⟶离题的，不着边际的（脱离轨道的）

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：dis(否定)+dain(deity,神性,尊敬)⟶鄙视，蔑视

senses.en: expressing approval or admiration, to the advantage of someone or something
senses.exampleZh: 该书得到高度赞扬性的评论。
senses.exampleEn: The book received highly favorable reviews.
collocations: a favorable studying environment 有利的学习环境

memoryTip: 近形联想：fealty(faith, 忠诚)⟶忠诚

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：feck(effect, 效果)+less⟶无能的，软弱的（无法达成实际效果的）

memoryTip: 谐音联想：fee("费"用)+ble⟶虚弱的（需要花钱看病的）

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: feed(喂养,提供)+back(回来)⟶反馈（提供回来）

senses.label: 考法1

senses.exampleEn: We need both positive and negative feedback from our customers.

memoryTip: 近形联想：feign(false, 假的)⟶假装

senses.label: 考法1

senses.exampleEn: Some animals feign death when in danger.

memoryTip: 近形联想：fevour(fever, 发热)⟶热忱

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：fester(ulcer, 溃疡)⟶溃烂⟶恶化（比喻用法）

memoryTip: 近形联想：fiery(fierce, 激烈的)⟶热烈的⟶暴躁的（过分热烈的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: full of or exuding emotion or spirit

senses.exampleEn: She has a fiery temper.

memoryTip: 近形联想： figura(figure, 形象)+tive⟶比喻的，象征的（通过形象故事讲道理的）

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：filt(felt,兽皮)+er⟶过滤（古代用兽皮过滤）⟶过滤器

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: fit(合适)+ting⟶适合的，恰当的⟶试衣；配件（用作名词，匹配合适的物件）

shortMeaning: adj.骇人听闻的，罪恶昭彰的
memoryTip: 区分联想：flagrant(骇人听闻的,谐音“腐烂的”) /  fragrant(芳香的)

senses.label: 考法1
senses.zh: 骇人听闻的，罪恶昭彰的
senses.en: conspicuously offensive
senses.exampleZh: 他公然蔑视任何人的感情。
senses.exampleEn: He showed a flagrant disregard for anyone else's feelings.

memoryTip: 近形联想：fleet(flow, 流动)+ing⟶短暂的

senses.en: lasting only a short time

memoryTip: flex(flect,bend,弯曲)+ibility⟶灵活性，适应性

senses.en: the state of being easily changed

senses.exampleEn: Our plans need to have enough flexibility to cater for the needs of everyone.

shortMeaning: v.繁荣；兴旺；做夸张的动作
memoryTip: 近形联想：flour(flower,开花)+ish⟶繁荣 ⟶兴旺⟶做夸张的动作

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to grow well

memoryTip: 拆分联想：fore(前面)+ground(地面)⟶突出的地位⟶强调（活用作动词，放到前方）

senses.exampleZh: 他们在各个领域都取得了显著的成绩。
senses.exampleEn: They have made marked achievements in all fields.
collocations: a marked difference/improvement 明显的差异/进步
a marked increase in profits 利润的显著提高

memoryTip: 近形联想：martinet(Martin, 马丁)⟶严格遵守纪律的人（马丁 · 路德是榜样）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: a person who stresses a rigid adherence to the details of forms and methods
senses.exampleZh: 他们发现新来的老师非常严格。
senses.exampleEn: They discovered that the new teacher was a martinet.

memoryTip: mask(面具)⟶掩盖，掩饰（活用作动词）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to disguise one's true character or intentions
senses.exampleZh: 繁荣的贸易数据背后掩盖着贸易极不景气的真相。
senses.exampleEn: The healthy trade figures masked a much gloomier picture.
related: masklike  adj.假面具样的，面具样的
collocations: to mask her shyness with a smile 用微笑掩盖她的娇羞

memoryTip: master(主人)⟶大师⟶硕士（即将成为大师的人）⟶精通，掌握（活用作动车）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: a man who has others working for him；someone who is very skilled at something；a holder of the second university degree
senses.exampleZh: 她已无法把握自己的未来。
senses.exampleEn: She was no longer master of her own future.
collocations: master degree 硕士学位
master bedroom 主卧室

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to learn or understand sth completely
senses.exampleZh: 法语他一直没有学好。
senses.exampleEn: French was a language he had never mastered.

memoryTip: 近形联想：match(mate,伙伴)⟶相匹敌（活用为动词，和小伙伴不相上下）⟶与...相匹配，相称（成为好伙伴）⟶相匹敌的人或事物（用作名词）

senses.label: 考法3
senses.en: to be the equal of (something or someone); to be as good as (something or someone)
senses.exampleZh: 很不幸，我们队在每个方面都无法与这个强大的对手相匹敌。
senses.exampleEn: Unfortunately, our team can't match the powerful rival in every aspect.

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to be exactly like; correspond exactly

senses.exampleEn: The doors were painted blue to match the walls.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: a person or thing equal or similar to another

senses.exampleEn: I was no match for him at tennis.
collocations: a match for sb.敌手，旗鼓相当的人

memoryTip: material(物质, 具体的东西)+ize⟶显现，出现⟶实现

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to appear especially suddenly

senses.exampleEn: A tall figure suddenly materialized at her side.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to begin to happen or exist

senses.exampleEn: The promotion he had been promised failed to materialize.

memoryTip: 谐音联想：maudlin("猫的泪")⟶伤感的，多愁善感的（猫被认为多情善感）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: weakly and effusively sentimental

senses.exampleEn: French papers largely sympathized with Jeanne Langevin, churning out maudlin articles about her selfish devotion to family and long-silent suffering.
collocations: a maudlin ballad  伤感的歌谣

memoryTip: 词源联想：maverick(Maverick, 美国农场主，拒绝和邻居一样给牛打烙印)⟶特立独行的人，标新立异的人⟶特立独行的（活用为形容词）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.zh: 特立独行的人，标新立异的人
senses.en: an independent individual who does not go along with a group or party

senses.exampleEn: He was too much of a maverick ever to hold high office.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: independent in behavior or thought
senses.exampleZh: 她特立独行的时尚态度让我们得到启发，她让我们看到什么叫做敢于尝试以及如何做到更加大胆一点。
senses.exampleEn: Her maverick approach to fashion is an inspiration and shows us all how to be a little more daring and experimental.
collocations: a maverick film director 独行其是的电影导演

memoryTip: 近形联想：mea(mean,吝啬的)+ger⟶缺乏的，不足的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: lacking desirable qualities; deficient in quality or quantity

senses.exampleEn: His meager wage is not enough to support their five children.
collocations: meager natural resources  贫乏的自然资源

memoryTip: measur(measure,测量)+ed⟶缓慢的（量着步子走的）⟶谨慎小心的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: done with thought and care

senses.exampleEn: The candidate's more measured response will appeal to voters.
collocations: to speak in measured words  说话很有分寸

memoryTip: meet(会合, 适应)⟶合适的，适当的（合适的人才会约去见面）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: precisely adapted to a particular situation, need, or circumstance : very proper
senses.exampleZh: 这门课程并不适合大三学生。
senses.exampleEn: This course is not meet for junior students.

memoryTip: 近形联想：meld(melt, 融化, weld, 焊接)⟶融合

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: merge, blend

senses.exampleEn: Most women in Sweden find it easy to meld femininity with feminist ideals.

memoryTip: mend(amend, 修改)+acious→虚伪的，捏造的（篡改事实的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: given to or characterized by deception or falsehood or divergence from absolute truth

senses.exampleEn: There is no provision about the legal responsibility of celebrities who engage in mendacious advertisements.

memoryTip: mercuri(mercury, 水银)+al⟶善变的，反复无常的（如水银一般无固定形状的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: characterized by rapid and unpredictable changeableness of mood
senses.exampleZh: 就连他最好的朋友也无法忍受他那反复无常的脾气。
senses.exampleEn: Even his best friends cannot tolerate his mercurial temperament.

memoryTip: 近形联想：meta(change, 改变)+phor(phone, 说)⟶暗喻，隐喻（改变说法，表面说A，实际说B）⟶象征

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: a word or phrase used to describe somebody/something else, in a way that is different from its normal use, in order to show that the two things have the same qualities and to make the description more powerful
senses.exampleZh: 当我们谈到基因图和基因测绘的时候，我们也就使用了一种制图方面的比喻说法。
senses.exampleEn: When we speak of gene maps and gene mapping, we use a cartographic metaphor.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: an object, activity, or idea that is used as a symbol of something else

shortMeaning: adj.一丝不苟的，小心谨慎的
memoryTip: 谐音联想：meticul(“米剔骨”)+ous⟶一丝不苟的，小心谨慎的（大米里剔骨头）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.zh: 一丝不苟的，小心谨慎的
senses.en: marked by extreme or excessive care in the consideration or treatment of details
senses.exampleZh: 我相信，在你们细致的照料下，这些树木每天都将茁壮成长。

collocations: careful and meticulous calculation  精打细算

memoryTip: mim(mime,哑剧)+ic⟶模仿的⟶善于模仿的人或动物（活用为名词）⟶模仿，和...相似（活用为动词）

collocations: market minimal 最低市场需求

senses.en: very small

senses.exampleZh: 美元的衰落给总是担惊受怕的投资者们带来了信心。
senses.exampleEn: The declining dollar gave heart to skittish investors.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: lively or frisky in action
senses.exampleZh: 鉴于消费者如此善变，服务业进展得亦不如人意。
senses.exampleEn: With consumers so skittish, service industries are not faring well either.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：skull(头颅)+dug(挖)+gery⟶舞弊，欺诈（挖空心思抄答案）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: crafty deception or trickery or an instance of it
senses.exampleZh: 没有证据支持任何涉嫌欺诈的指控。
senses.exampleEn: There is no evidence to support any allegations of skullduggery.

memoryTip: 拆分联想：slap(拍打)+dash(冲撞)⟶马虎的，草率的（做事撞来撞去）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: hasty and careless, as in execution
senses.exampleZh: 马尔科姆的方法显得极其粗枝大叶。
senses.exampleEn: Malcolm's methods appeared amazingly slapdash.
collocations: a slapdash piece of writing 一篇粗制滥造的文章

memoryTip: 近形联想：s("死")+leazy(lazy,懒惰的)⟶卑劣的，不光彩的（因为懒惰而死的人肯定是不光彩的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: dishonest or corrupt; disreputable
senses.exampleZh: 这些指控让政府的行为显得越发不光彩了。
senses.exampleEn: The accusations are making the government's conduct appear increasingly sleazy.
collocations: a sleazy reporter 不正派的记者

memoryTip: 近形联想：s(small,小)+light(轻的)⟶微小的，细小的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: deficient in weight, solidity, or importance : trivial
senses.exampleZh: 医生说他的病情稍有好转。
senses.exampleEn: Doctors say he has made a slight improvement.
collocations: a slight woman 瘦小的女子

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to treat as slight or unimportant
senses.exampleZh: 因为没有充分地征求他们的意见，他们感到被怠慢了。
senses.exampleEn: They felt slighted by not being adequately consulted.
collocations: slighting remarks 不敬的话语

memoryTip: 近形联想：slip(滑动)+pery⟶ 光滑的⟶ 难以理解的（文章的主题滑的让人无法抓住，比喻难以理解）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: causing or tending to cause something to slide or fall
senses.exampleZh: 提醒驾车人要当心路滑。
senses.exampleEn: Motorists were warned to beware of slippery conditions.
related: slip v.& n.滑动，滑倒 n.犯错，疏漏
collocations: slippery like a fish 滑得像一条鱼

senses.label: 考法2
senses.zh: 难以理解的，棘手的，不可靠的
senses.en: not easy to understand or identify in an exact way
senses.exampleZh: 这个概念很难懂，没有人能理解它。
senses.exampleEn: This concept is slippery no one can understand it.

memoryTip: 近形联想：sluggish(slack, 松弛的，懈怠的)⟶迟缓的，懒散的（松懈的状态）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: displaying little movement or activity; slow; inactive
senses.exampleZh: 经济保持缓慢发展。
senses.exampleEn: The economy remained sluggish.

memoryTip: 近形联想：slumber(sleep, 睡觉)⟶睡眠，蛰伏

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to sleep; to be dormant or quiescent
senses.exampleZh: 一些昆虫在冬季蛰伏。
senses.exampleEn: Some insects slumber in the winter.
related: slumberous adj. 昏昏欲睡的，催眠的

memoryTip: 近形联想：s(使)+lur(blur,模糊不清)⟶使模糊⟶诽谤，诋毁（使人的名誉模糊）

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: an insulting or disparaging remark that may damage people's reputation
senses.exampleZh: 这是对伦敦市警察局刚正廉明作风的又一次诽谤。
senses.exampleEn: This was yet another slur on the integrity of the Metropolitan Police.

memoryTip: 近形联想：smother(smoke,烟)⟶使窒息（烟太大不能呼吸，所以闷死）⟶抑制（比喻用法）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to suffocate (another)
senses.exampleZh: 一位父亲在医院里企图捂死自己 6 周大的儿子的情景被秘密地拍了下来。
senses.exampleEn: A father was secretly filmed as he tried to smother his six-week-old son in hospital.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: to stop or prevent the growth or activity of
senses.exampleZh: 她试图抑制住怒气，帮助他们解决纠纷。
senses.exampleEn: She tried to smother her anger and help them resolve their conflicts.

shortMeaning: n.（隐藏或者意料之外的）困难，障碍
memoryTip: 谐音联想：snag("死拦哥")⟶困难，障碍

senses.label: 考法1
senses.zh: （隐藏或者意料之外的）困难，障碍
senses.en: a concealed or unexpected difficulty or obstacle
senses.exampleZh: 匪徒偷走了警方一辆汽车后，警方打击盗车贼的行动遇到了一点儿小挫折。
senses.exampleEn: A police clampdown on car thieves hit a snag when villains stole one of their cars.

memoryTip: 近形联想：snub(snob,势利眼)⟶轻视，冷落（势利眼会轻视不如自己的人）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to treat with contempt or neglect
senses.exampleZh: 他在公共场合故意冷落她，让她觉得自己像是一个白痴。
senses.exampleEn: He snubbed her in public and made her feel an idiot.

memoryTip: 近形联想：sober(somber,严峻的)⟶严肃的，冷静的（形容人严肃清醒）⟶朴素的（形容物古板肃静）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: subdued in tone or color
senses.exampleZh: 他总是穿素净的灰西服。
senses.exampleEn: He dresses in sober grey suits.
collocations: a sober grey suit 一套素净的灰西装

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: serious and sensible, clear-headed
senses.exampleZh: 我们现在比以前严肃多了，也现实多了。
senses.exampleEn: We are now far more sober and realistic than before.
related: sobering adj. 严峻的，令人深思的
collocations: a sober judgement  冷静的判断

memoryTip: 近形联想：soci(social,社交的)+ability(能力)⟶社交性，善于社交

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: the quality or state of being sociable
senses.exampleZh: 提高你所从事事业中的社交性，你就能得到追寻已久的声望。
senses.exampleEn: Increase sociability in everything you do and you will reach the popularity you seek.
related: sociable adj. 合群的，群居的，好交际的

memoryTip: 近形联想：sol(sun,太阳)+emn⟶严肃的，庄严的（像太阳一样神圣庄严的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: very serious or formal in manner, behavior, or expression
senses.exampleZh: 他面露严肃之色。
senses.exampleEn: He wore a very solemn expression on his face.
collocations: a solemn ritual 庄严的仪式

memoryTip: 近形联想：solid(一致的)+arity(名词后缀)⟶团结一致

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: unity (as of a group or class) that produces or is based on community of interests, objectives, and standards
senses.exampleZh: 支持者有意在明天游行以表现对他们领导的支持。
senses.exampleEn: Supporters want to march tomorrow to show solidarity with their leaders.
collocations: community solidarity 社区团结

memoryTip: 近形联想：so(sub,在下面)+mber(umbra,影子,阴影)⟶灰暗的，单调的（在影子下面的）⟶阴郁的（情绪灰暗的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: lacking brightness or color; dull
senses.exampleZh: 她抬起头来，凝望着十二月份阴沉沉的天空。
senses.exampleEn: She looked up staring at the somber December sky.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: of a dismal or depressing character
senses.exampleZh: 与很多悲伤的西方葬礼相反，巴厘的印度教火葬仪式有一种几乎狂欢节般的气氛。
senses.exampleEn: Contrary to the more somber western funerals, cremation ceremonies among the Hindus of Bali have an almost carnival-like atmosphere.
collocations: somber girl 忧郁少女
somber news 悲痛的消息

memoryTip: 近形联想：somno(sleep,睡觉)+lent⟶瞌睡的，困倦的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: of a kind likely to induce sleep
senses.exampleZh: 这种镇静剂会让人瞌睡。
senses.exampleEn: The sedative makes people very somnolent.
collocations: a somnolent cat 打瞌睡的猫

memoryTip: 谐音联想：soothe("舒适")⟶抚慰，缓和

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to bring comfort, solace, or reassurance to
senses.exampleZh: 这些数据缓和了外界对全球经济的担忧，推动亚洲股市全线上扬。
senses.exampleEn: The data served to soothe some jitters over the global economy and boost Asian markets overall.

memoryTip: 近形联想：soph( sophisticated,富有经验的)+ist(从事某种职业的人)⟶诡辩者（富有经验的）⟶智者，哲学家

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: one skilled in elaborate and devious argumentation
senses.exampleZh: 通过提问题，这位诡辩者成功转移了大家对其推理的缺陷。
senses.exampleEn: By asking questions, the sophist successfully diverted the attention of people from flaws in his reasoning.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: a teacher of philosophy
senses.exampleZh: “智者”一词逐渐获得了这样的意味：怀疑、雄心勃勃和无所顾忌的竞争。
senses.exampleEn: The word " sophist " gradually acquired the connotations of skepticism, ambition and unscrupulous competitiveness.

shortMeaning: adj.高级的，复杂的；老练的，世故的
memoryTip: 近形联想：sophisticated(sophomore, 二年级学生)⟶复杂的（比起一年级学生，二年级学生思想更成熟复杂，更有经验） ⟶老练的，世故的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: having a refined knowledge of the ways of the world cultivated especially through wide experience
senses.exampleZh: 这些人是观察外交政策领域动向的行家里手。
senses.exampleEn: These people are very sophisticated observers of the foreign policy scene.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: highly complicated or developed
senses.exampleZh: 蜜蜂所使用的交流系统是昆虫中最复杂的之一。
senses.exampleEn: Honeybees use one of the most sophisticated communication systems of any insect.
collocations: highly sophisticated computer systems 十分先进的计算机系统

shortMeaning: adj.肮脏的，污秽的；卑劣的，可耻的
memoryTip: 谐音联想：sordid("扫地的")⟶肮脏的，污秽的（环境肮脏需要扫地的）⟶卑劣的，可耻的（比喻人心里肮脏的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: very dirty and unpleasant
senses.exampleZh: 城市里的穷人生活在破败社区的肮脏不堪的环境里。
senses.exampleEn: Poor people of the city live in sordid environment of the abandoned communities.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: marked by baseness or grossness; immoral or dishonest
senses.exampleZh: 她听凯特对这件丑事作何解释。
senses.exampleEn: She listened to Kate's explanations of the sordid affair.

memoryTip: 词义联想：sound(声音,响声)⟶健康的（声音或响声正常，说明是健康的）⟶牢固的⟶可靠的，合理的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: exhibiting normal health
senses.exampleZh: 你的心脏和年轻人一样健康。
senses.exampleEn: Your heart is as sound as a young man's.
collocations: to be of sound mind (= not mentally ill) 神志健全
(as) sound as a bell 状况极佳
十分健康

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: logically valid and having true premises
senses.exampleZh: 有可靠的科学依据可以证明某些气体对大气的影响。
senses.exampleEn: There is sound scientific evidence of what certain gases do to the atmosphere.

memoryTip: 近形联想：sover(govern, 管理, 统治)+eignty⟶主权，自主统治权

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: a country's independent authority and the right to govern itself
senses.exampleZh: 英国对捍卫国家主权的关切早已不是什么新鲜事了。
senses.exampleEn: Britain's concern to protect national sovereignty is far from new.

collocations: the sovereignty of Parliament 议会的最高权威

memoryTip: 词源联想：spartan(Spartan, 斯巴达人)⟶简朴的，清苦的（斯巴达人以崇尚简朴著称）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: marked by simplicity, frugality, or avoidance of luxury and comfort
senses.exampleZh: 他们不使用冰箱和电话，过着简朴的生活。
senses.exampleEn: Their spartan lifestyle prohibits a fridge or a phone.

memoryTip: 近形联想：spec(看)+ious(形容词后缀)⟶虚假的，似是而非的（看着还行，实际不行）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: falsely appearing to be fair, just, or right

senses.exampleEn: It is unlikely that the Duke was convinced by such specious arguments.

memoryTip: 近形联想：spectac(spectacle, 精彩表演, 壮观场面)+ular⟶壮观的，引人注目的

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: of, relating to, or being a spectacle
senses.exampleZh: 木星，天王星和海王星也有环，但土星的环，是迄今为止规模最大，最为壮观的。
senses.exampleEn: Jupiter, Uranus, and Neptune also have rings, but Saturn's are by far the largest and most spectacular.
collocations: spectacular scenery 壮丽的景色

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to take to be true on the basis of insufficient evidence: theorize

senses.exampleEn: The doctors speculate that he died of a cerebral haemorrhage caused by a blow on the head.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: invest at a risk
senses.exampleZh: 他喜欢投机股市。
senses.exampleEn: He likes to speculate on the stock market.

memoryTip: 近形联想：spont(sponsor,赞助人)+aneous⟶自发的(赞助人给钱是自发的)

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: done or said in a natural and often sudden way and without a lot of thought or planning
senses.exampleZh: 戴安娜的房子挤满了人，他们在欢快音乐的伴奏下不由自主地唱起歌来。

collocations: a spontaneous offer of help 主动提出帮助

memoryTip: 近形联想：spora(spore,孢子)+dic→偶尔的，间断发生的（象孢子一样零星生长的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: occurring occasionally, singly, or in irregular or random instances

collocations: sporadic violence 零星的暴力事件
sporadic outbreaks of the disease 那种疾病的偶尔爆发

memoryTip: 近形联想：spur(sting,刺)⟶马刺（刺激马快跑的金属尖刺）⟶激励，促进（活用作动词）

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：spurious(suspicious,怀疑的)⟶虚假的，伪造的（可疑的）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: false, although seeming to be genuine

memoryTip: 近形联想：sp(spit,吐口水)+urn(shun,回避)⟶（轻蔑地）拒绝（吐着口水回避）

senses.label: 考法1

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：sta(stand,站立)+l(像枪)+war(战争)+t("他")⟶坚定的，忠实的（他站在那里拿着枪准备参加战争的样子）⟶健壮的（引申表示身体或思想强大）

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：stanch(stand, 站住, 静止)⟶止血，平息

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 拆分联想：stand(站立)+still(静止)⟶停止，停顿（静止地站立在那里）

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：start(出发)+le⟶惊吓（突然启动，吓人一跳）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: to frighten or surprise suddenly

memoryTip: 近形联想：starva(starve, 饿死, become stiff, 变僵硬)+tion⟶饥饿，饿死

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: suffering or death caused by having nothing to eat or not enough to eat

senses.exampleEn: Millions will face starvation next year as a result of the drought.

memoryTip: 近形联想：sta(stone)+unch(church)⟶坚定的，忠诚的（石头教堂坚固，代表坚定的信仰）

senses.label: 考法1
senses.en: steadfast in loyalty or principle

senses.exampleEn: He's a staunch supporter of controls on government spending.

senses.label: 考法1

senses.exampleEn: He stove off his failure as best he could.

memoryTip: 近形联想：stem(stand,站立)⟶主茎⟶阻止（活用作动词，用主茎树干木桩阻断洪水，词形受“stop”影响）

senses.label: 考法1

senses.exampleEn: He stooped down, cut the stem for her with his knife and handed her the flower.

memoryTip: 近形联想：ster(star,星星)+ling⟶出色的，优异的（像星星一样光彩夺目的）

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：sting("死盯")+y⟶吝啬的，小气的（死盯着自己的东西）

senses.label: 考法1

memoryTip: 近形联想：sty(stay)+mie(mile, 英里)→阻碍（stay a mile way，距离阻碍了彼此的相见）

senses.label: 考法1

shortMeaning: adj.微妙的，难以察觉的；难以理解的

senses.label: 考法1

senses.en: so slight as to be difficult to detect or describe; also: difficult to understand; abstruse

senses.exampleEn: I even began to exploit him in subtle ways.

senses.label: 考法2
senses.en: able to make fine distinctions; behaving in a clever way

memoryTip: 词源联想：success(succeed,接替)+ive→连续的，相继的
